title: versioning — scheduled tasks
description: Two entries: hourly sunset scan + daily reminder-notice dispatcher.

entries.name: process-sunsets
entries.purpose: Every hour at :05: scan for deprecated versions where sunset_at ≤ now() + dispatch SunsetApiVersionJob for each. Idempotent via job uniqueFor.

entries.name: sunset-reminders
entries.purpose: Daily 12:00 UTC: for deprecated versions with sunset_at in 30d / 7d / 3d / 1d windows, auto-create + publish sunset_reminder DeprecationNotices (idempotent via notice_type + api_version_id + notify_window unique constraint on metadata).
